who: procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
offer: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause late fees and service interruptions. We automate renewal tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendar reminders.
problem: Missed contract renewal dates leading to late fees and service interruptions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Indie Hackers discussions on contract management
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing procurement tools
try_it: Let users try email alerts for upcoming renewals and dashboard for contract overview on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
